session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8869 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the skill by running the command to fetch PR feedback and then classify it:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "Git diff not available"
Get file restructuring context for pre-existing detection

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-06 20:34:41 PT

Found 1 violation across 1 file. Inline comment posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Verbatim code blocks — None found (CLI usage and commit format blocks are acceptable exceptions)

❌ Drift risk — Found in docs/learned/architecture/health-check-runner-gateway.md:55 (private method `_load_artifact_allowlist()` named in prose)

## Summary
PR #8869 has **no unresolved review threads** and **no actionable discussion comments**. All 5 discussion comments are informational in nature:
1. Plan submission metadata (schrockn) 2. GitHub Action workflow started (github-actions[bot]) 3. Implementation started notification (github-actions[bot]) 4. Audit PR Docs report (github-actions[bot]) 5. PR Review Comments Addressed notification (github-actions[bot])
These are purely informational - workflow status updates, audit reports, and automation records - so they do not require action and are not included in actionable threads.
